title: Icely-Candy-Like Thai Eggplant Pancake
description: A kid-friendly and gluten-free friendly dish that combines the soft texture of eggplants with a sugary glaze to create a delightful candy-like treat.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Rinse and slice thai eggplant into thin pieces.
In a mixing bowl, combine glucose syrup with cornstarch. Mix well until no lumps remain.
Gently fold in watermelon sugar, paprika flakes, and milk powder into the eggplant mixture.
Heat vegetable oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat. Pour in the eggplant mixture.
Cook for 3-5 minutes or until golden brown on bottom. Transfer to a baking dish lined with parchment paper, spreading evenly.
Pour the sugar syrup over the pancake and bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Turn off the heat, let it sit for another 20 minutes.
